creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
Built rhythmbox from ports, it appears that there is an upstream bug with the notification status applet that is keeps it from running in the panel.  Attempting to enable the status applet from rhythmbox emits the following error in a terminal when executed:

(rhythmbox:64256): Rhythmbox-WARNING **: /usr/local/lib/rhythmbox/plugins/status-icon/libstatus-icon.so: Undefined symbol "notify_notification_attach_to_status_icon"

(rhythmbox:64256): Rhythmbox-WARNING **: Could not load plugin status-icon

How-To-Repeat: run rhythmbox from a terminal, select Edit->plugins, attempt to enable status icon
